# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- In `Species.Client`, each file should contain only a single class or entity, and enums should live under the `Enums` folder.
- Keep the current top-level structure (`InputHandling`, `Presentation`, `Renderers`, `ViewModelFactories`, `ViewModels`); avoid reorganizing into screen-based folders and preserve existing UI behavior during refactors.
- Keep files organized by responsibility with one class or entity per file.
- Use the latest codebase in the workspace as the source of truth for work on the Species project.
